title: Full Screen Mode Shortcut or Person

posts.author: brunodsantis (Bruno)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I’ve tried to find another question but I didn’t find anything similar.

I find very useful to use the Full Screen Mode most of the time, but I also tend to close the Full Screen Mode quite a lot. Is there a short cut for opening/closing Full Screen Mode? Instead of clicking on the 3 dots at the right top corner ? more actions > Full Screen Mode…

Kind Regards,
Bruno

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@brunodsantis

On windows, F11 will toggle full screen mode.

Jim - The Monday Man
Get Custom Apps, Integrations & Automations for monday

posts.author: brunodsantis (Bruno)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s great. Thanks Jim

posts.author: velma41abbott (Velma Abbott)
posts.cookedHtml:
Jim - The Monday Man:

On windows, F11 will toggle full screen mode.

Hello,

For Windows, F11 seems to do the trick, but are there other shortcuts or tips for toggling Full Screen Mode quickly?

posts.author: Kofi (Kofi FiftyTechSolutions.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
The shortcut key varies on the browser you are using.

Here’s a list of shortcut keys for the popular browsers:

Google Chrome (Windows/Linux): F11

Google Chrome (Mac): Control + Command + F

Microsoft Edge: F11

Mozilla Firefox (Windows/Linux): F11

Mozilla Firefox (Mac): Control + Command + F

Safari (Mac): Control + Command + F

Opera (Windows/Linux): F11

Opera (Mac): Control + Command + F

Brave (Windows/Linux): F11

Vivaldi (Windows/Linux): F11

I hope this helps!

Cheers

Kofi | FiftyTechSolutions
